title: Extend your work permit - Canada.ca
content:
## Extend your work permit
How to work longer in Canada as a temporary worker or a live-in caregiver and how to get a bridging work permit
- Sign in or create an account
- Check processing times

## Services and information
How to apply, forms, fees and how to change employers, become a permanent worker, or re-enter Canada

### Extend your International Experience Canada work permit
Reasons for extending or making changes to your International Experience Canada work permit and how to apply

### Bridging open work permit
How to keep working while you wait for a decision on your permanent residence application

### Leaving Canada and re-entering
What you need to know as a foreign worker planning to temporarily leave and then re-enter Canada

### Get a visitor visa to return to Canada
How and when a work permit holder should apply
How to apply, forms, fees and what to do if you change, quit, or lose your job

### Find a new job in Canada
Search for a new job as a temporary foreign worker

### Explore immigration programs
Answer a few questions to see different ways you might be able to come to Canada
- Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada
